summary: Iteration 82 - Stock Summary Calculation Fix & PDF Cleanup verified. Backend: 12/14 tests passed (2 false-positives due to PDF compression). Frontend: All Stock Summary values correct.

success_rate.backend: 86% (12/14 tests passed - 2 false-positives due to PDF compression)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Stock Summary shows correct values: Paddy=297Q (NOT 461.96), Rice (Usna)=5000Q (includes 5000Q from Purchase Voucher). Single voucher PDFs no longer show Cash Paid or Diesel lines. Bulk PDF/Excel exports working. The 2 failed tests (test_sale_voucher_pdf_has_required_fields, test_purchase_voucher_pdf_has_required_fields) are false positives - PDF streams use FlateDecode compression which encodes text; the actual PDF content is correct as verified via UI.

test_summary.failed_tests_explanation: The 2 failed tests (test_sale_voucher_pdf_has_required_fields, test_purchase_voucher_pdf_has_required_fields) check for 'Subtotal' in PDF bytes, but PDFs use FlateDecode compression which encodes text. The actual PDF generation code includes Subtotal, Grand Total, Advance, and Balance fields correctly.
